notFound.title: Lost in the mist?
notFound.description: Like wandering into an undiscovered corner of Đà Lạt, this page doesn't exist. But the journey home is just a click away.
notFound.tagline: Events · People · Moments · Love · Đà Lạt 🇻🇳

redirectHelp.title: Got a little lost
redirectHelp.description: Your browser and our server got stuck in a loop. It happens — let's sort it out.
redirectHelp.cookiesBlockedDescription: We need cookies to keep you signed in. Enable them for dalat.app and try again.
redirectHelp.fix1: Clear cookies for dalat.app and try again (button below does this)
redirectHelp.fix2: Try a different browser (Chrome, Safari, or Edge)
redirectHelp.fix3: If using Firefox, check that cookies aren't blocked for this site

quote1.text: The best view comes after the hardest climb.

quote3.text: A good cup of coffee fixes most things.

quote4.text: Not all who wander are lost — some just need to clear their cookies.

quote5.text: The flowers don't rush to bloom. Take a breath.

quote6.text: Every redirect loop has an exit.

quote7.text: In Dalat, even the rain is beautiful.

quote8.text: The journey of a thousand pages begins with a single click.

series.thisSeriesOnlyDescription: Update only the template. Future auto-generated events will inherit these changes.
series.allFutureEventsDescription: Update the template and all existing future events that haven't been modified.
series.cancelSeriesDescription: Cancel this recurring event series. This action cannot be undone.
series.cancelFutureOnlyDescription: Keep past events but cancel all upcoming dates.
series.cancelAllEventsDescription: Cancel the entire series including past events.
series.confirmCancelFuture: This will cancel all future events in this series. Past events will remain visible. This action cannot be undone.
series.confirmCancelAll: This will cancel ALL events in this series, including past events. This action cannot be undone.
series.editingSeriesEvent: This event is part of a recurring series
series.editThisEventOnlyDescription: Changes will only apply to this specific date.
series.editThisAndFutureEventsDescription: Changes will apply to this and all upcoming dates.
series.editAllEventsInSeriesDescription: Changes will apply to all events, including past dates.

verification.title: Verification

discover.subtitle: Events, venues, food, and authentic moments from Vietnam's beloved highland city.
discover.aboutBody: ĐàLạt.app is the community-powered event discovery platform for Da Lat (Đà Lạt), Lam Dong, Vietnam. From live music at cozy cafes to art exhibitions, creative workshops, and seasonal festivals, we help you find and experience the best of Vietnam's highland city. Discover events happening tonight, this weekend, or plan your next trip to Da Lat.
